art_highlights: Whitney Biennial 2026 in NYC runs until August 23.
Carol Bove at the Guggenheim continues until August 2.
Monet and Venice opens today (March 21) at the de Young Museum, San Francisco.
Lagos, Nigeria exhibition 'Wake Up!' gains international traction.
V&A Museum 'Schiaparelli: Fashion Becomes Art' prepares for March 28 opening.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Negative; volatility continues as Iran-Israel conflict intensifies, impacting global energy prices and supply chains.
market_summary.key_drivers: Escalation in Iran conflict, South Pars gas field strike, Brent Crude volatility ($110/bbl), US stock indices hitting 2026 lows.
market_summary.trend: Forced liquidations in global markets; 'peak uncertainty' phase with focus on potential energy intervention in the Strait of Hormuz.
